title: Spandam Tightens Control
description: The rescue force follows the Sea Train through the storm, with the Straw Hats and their new allies fully committed to saving Robin.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Sanji, Franky, Nico Robin, Spandam, Paulie. The rescue force follows the Sea Train through the storm, with the Straw Hats and their new allies fully committed to saving Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: PA-.....!! Paulie-san!! Thank you very much.

dialogue.speaker: Wanze
dialogue.text: That's never happened before, not even once.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Is Nico Robin Safe aboard that "Sea Train"?!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: It would have to be hit directly.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: It must be one of your friends.

dialogue.speaker: CP9 agent
dialogue.text: We found it right over here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The answer we're looking for is...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: SanjiSun is with Nico Robin right now!!!

summary: The rescue force follows the Sea Train through the storm, with the Straw Hats and their new allies fully committed to saving Robin.
